description: The ModelExportable component is used to mark a slot hierarchy as a model that can be exported to a user's local machine. This will export static and skinned meshes, but is subject to the same restrictions normal model exporting has.

fields.Root: The slot to treat as a model that can be exported.
fields.OnlyComponents: What components should only be exported, rather than all mesh data components in the hiearchy. If this list is blank, it will not have any affect.
